evals.prompt: Turn evals/files/draft-body-only.md into a private draft with site-ready front matter, explicit validation status, and the right next publication step. Keep the work focused on packaging, not body rewriting.
evals.expected_output: A repo-ready private draft with complete front matter, a validation step, and a clear next command or workflow handoff.
assertions: Adds YAML front matter or an equivalent metadata block
Includes title, description, permalink, categories, tags, and last_modified_at
Includes image metadata and fact_check_status when packaging for publish readiness
References validation or publish workflow steps such as scripts/validate-post.sh or make validate-draft

evals.prompt: Complete the packaging work for evals/files/draft-metadata-incomplete.md so it is ready for publish QA. Normalize the front matter, validate it, and state the next repo workflow step.
evals.expected_output: A publish-ready packaging result that normalizes metadata, validates the draft, and clearly states the next repo-local workflow step.
assertions: Normalizes front matter fields required by this repo
Preserves the focus on metadata, validation, and publication workflow
Names the next repo-local command or workflow step
